name: Interego Memory
description: Pod-rooted typed memory backed by the Interego substrate. Every store becomes a signed cg:ContextDescriptor with proper modal status, supersedes-chains, and (optionally) E2EE cross-pod sharing.

podUrl.description: Solid-style pod URL where memories will be persisted (e.g. https://your-pod.example/agent/).

agentDid.description: DID of the agent doing the writing. Sets PROV provenance and signs each descriptor (e.g. did:web:your-pod.example).

onBehalfOf.description: Optional DID of the human / org owner the agent is acting on behalf of. If set, descriptors are wasAttributedTo this owner; the agent appears as wasAssociatedWith.

shareWith.description: Optional default delegates (DIDs) — every memory write is wrapped in an E2EE envelope for these recipients.

autoCapture.description: When true, the plugin subscribes to OpenClaw's after-assistant-response hook and stores extracted facts automatically.

autoRecall.description: When true, the plugin subscribes to OpenClaw's before-prompt-build hook and surfaces relevant memories on each turn.
